name: QwenPaw Evolution
author: QwenPaw Evolution Team
description: A product-level self-evolution plugin. Provides native skill evolution, proactive dream cycles, and a built-in Security Shield. No MCP overhead.

features: Self-Evolving: Native tool injection (No MCP subprocess)
Security Shield: Static AST audit for AI-generated code
Proactive Dream Loop: Automated history audit & wiki update
Windows Friendly: Native path handling and BOM support
